title: Liftatx
html: Stub. Austin-area business at liftatx.com (likely fitness/lifting). Used by Yahir as a recurring test subject for the Rankett free-audit flow (2026 02 19 screenshot 2026 02 19 at 7 13 22 pm 1365f3b9, 2026 02 19 screenshot 2026 02 19 at 7 13 27 pm 2d5c5f9c) and pinned in his bookmark bar across Feb 2026 screenshots — possibly an early prospect, possibly a personal gym he frequents.
